mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case when degree=1 then '初中' when degree=2 then '高中' when degree=3 then '大专' when degree=4 then '本科' when degree=5 then '硕士' when degree=6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree order by degree;
